lines.speaker: Bobby
lines.text: Hello there friend! I'm Bobby the gnome child.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you heading into The Nutcracker?

lines.speaker: Bobby
lines.text: Oh yes. Me and Pa have been looking forward to this all year. Isn't that right Pa?

lines.speaker: Father Gnome
lines.text: Yes Bobby. There's no doubt we will be sipping mulled pine inside The Nutcracker in no time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Woah, you're very big for a Gnome.

lines.speaker: Father Gnome
lines.text: And you're very rude for a human.

lines.speaker: Father Gnome
lines.text: Don't listen to them Bobby. You're just a little different.

lines.speaker: Bobby
lines.text: Nice to meet you [player name]. Does somebody need a hug?
